manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide one single-word clue that relates to some of your team's words from the list below. You can choose to how many and to which words your clue relates to.
The goal is to have your partner guess all of your team's words based on the clues you give them, before the other team has uncovered all of theirs. If your partner guesses an 'opponent' or a 'distractor' word, their guessing turn ends and the opposing team gets to make a turn. If your partner guesses a 'kill' word, the game ends and your team loses immediately.
The more words your clue relates to, the quicker you can win the game, but the harder the associations may be to guess for your partner, so choose your clue word wisely. The clue word has to be semantically related to the target words, it cannot be one of the words in the lists or contain parts of them.

Always give your single-word clue and your comma-separated list of related target words in the following format and make your answers as short as possible, never include any other text than is required in this form:

CLUE: <WORD>
TARGETS: <TARGETS>

Your team words are: missile, button, cap, time, novel, straw, server, himalayas, spy.
Your opponent's team words are: ice, car, shot, piano, lion, bank, fork, strike.
Distractor words are: beach, gold, bridge, whip, pumpkin, change, bill.
The kill words are: space.

message.content:
CLUE: technology
TARGETS: missile, button, server, spy

We need a single-word clue that relates to some of our team words: missile, button, cap, time, novel, straw... etc. Must not be any of the words in list, including opponent, distractor, kill. Also cannot contain parts of them. Provide clue and list TARGETS being which words are related.

We want to give clue that covers many of our words but careful not to hint opponent words etc. Choose a clue like "adventure"? Relates to novel, Himalayas, maybe missile? Not sure. Could be "south"? Not. Must be one word.

We need to think which of our words can be linked semantically by a single clue.

Possible categories: "peak"? Relates to Himalayas, cap? Not. "Mountain"? Him... cap? No.

"Spy" could connect to "novel" (spy novel) and "missile" (spy missile?) maybe not.

"Button", "cap", "time", "straw", "server", "missile", "novel", "Himalayas", "spy". Could clue "author"? relates to novel, maybe spy (author of spy novels), maybe? Not.

"Security"? relates to button (security button), missile (security missile), spy (security). Might be.

"Drink"? straw relates, cap (bottle cap), maybe.

"Cold"? no.

Maybe "Mountaineer"? relates to Himalayas, cap (cap as hat). Not.

Perhaps give clue "technology". Relates to missile, button, server, spy. That's four. Good.

Check not a word from any list: technology is not present. Good.

But "technology" may also loosely relate to "time"? maybe not. We'll list targets: missile, button, server, spy. That seems safe. None of the opponent/distractor words are also technology. Good.

Provide output.
